MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'UR3e_002'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'Nameplate'})

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'CRX10iA_Type'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'CapabilityDescription'})
      -[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
RETURN el.idShort, el.value, el.entityType, labels(el)

// Check UR3e type capability
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'UR3e_Type'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'CapabilityDescription'})
      -[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)

// Check UR20 type capability

      -[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
RETURN el.idShort, el.value, el.entityType, labels(el)

// Check UR3e Type TechnicalData
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'UR3e_Type'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'TechnicalData'})
      -[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
RETURN el.idShort, el.value, el.valueType, labels(el)

// Check CRX10iA Type TechnicalData for CollaborativeOperation
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'CRX10iA_Type'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'TechnicalData'})
      -[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property {idShort: 'CollaborativeOperation'})
RETURN p.idShort, p.value, p.valueType

// Check UR20 Type TechnicalData for CollaborativeOperation
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'UR20_Type'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'TechnicalData'})
      -[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property {idShort: 'CollaborativeOperation'})
RETURN p.idShort, p.value, p.valueType

// Check MiR100 Type TechnicalDataAGV for CollaborativeOperation
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'MiR100_Type'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'TechnicalDataAGV'})
      -[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property {idShort: 'CollaborativeOperation'})
RETURN p.idShort, p.value, p.valueType

// Check MiR100 TechnicalDataAGV content
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'MiR100_Type'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'TechnicalDataAGV'})
      -[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
RETURN el.idShort, el.value, el.valueType, labels(el)

// Check UR20 Type TechnicalData for collaborative operation
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'UR20_Type'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'TechnicalData'})
      -[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property {idShort: 'CollaborativeOperation'})
RETURN p.idShort, p.value, p.valueType

// Confirm all assets in Hall 4 hierarchy
MATCH (container:AssetAdministrationShell {id: 'urn:aas:hall4'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'HierarchicalStructures'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(parent:Entity {idShort: 'EntryNode'})

RETURN sm.idShort, sm.id, sc.id AS templateId
LIMIT 20

OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall4:hierarchicalstructures'})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)

args.cypher:
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)

WITH aas, sm
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN aas.idShort AS asset_idShort, aas.id AS asset_id, sm.idShort AS submodel_idShort, sm.id AS submodel_id, sc.id AS semantic_id
LIMIT 50

RETURN aas.idShort AS asset_idShort, aas.id AS asset_id, sm.id AS submodel_id

MATCH (sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN DISTINCT sc.id ORDER BY sc.id

ORDER BY aas.idShort

ORDER BY el.idShort

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall4:hierarchicalstructures'})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)

ORDER BY el.idShort

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall4:hierarchicalstructures'})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(dev:SubmodelElement)

OPTIONAL MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: dev.idShort})-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)

ORDER BY aas.idShort, p.idShort

args.cypher:
MATCH (sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/smt/assetlocation/1/0'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(prop:Property)
WHERE prop.idShort IN ['Hall', 'Location', 'Area', 'Building', 'Floor']
RETURN sm.id AS submodel_id, prop.idShort, prop.value AS hall_value

MATCH (sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/smt/assetlocation/1/0'})
RETURN sm.id AS submodel_id, sm.idShort

      -[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(prop:Property)

RETURN aas.idShort, aas.id, sm.idShort

args.name: Hierarchical Structures enabling Bills of Material

args.cypher:
MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall4:hierarchicalstructures'})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(entity:Entity)
OPTIONAL MATCH (entity)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN entity.idShort, entity.entityType, sc.id AS semanticId

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall4:hierarchicalstructures'})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(node:Entity {idShort: 'Node'})
MATCH (node)-[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(rel:RelationshipElement)
WHERE rel.idShort IN ['SameAs', 'IsPartOf', 'HasPart']
OPTIONAL MATCH (rel)-[:HAS_FIRST]->(ref)
RETURN node.idShort, rel.idShort, ref

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall4:hierarchicalstructures'})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(device:Entity)
WHERE device.idShort IN ['CRX10iA_001', 'MiR100_001', 'UR3e_002']
OPTIONAL MATCH (device)-[r]->(other)
RETURN device.idShort, type(r) AS relType, labels(other) AS otherLabels, other.idShort AS otherIdShort, other.id AS otherId

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall4:hierarchicalstructures'})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(device:Entity)
WHERE device.idShort IN ['CRX10iA_001', 'MiR100_001', 'UR3e_002']
MATCH (device)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
RETURN device.idShort, asset.globalAssetId, asset.assetKind, asset.assetType

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
WHERE asset.globalAssetId IN ['urn:asset:crx10ia:001', 'urn:asset:mir100:001', 'urn:asset:ur3e:002']
RETURN aas.idShort, aas.id, asset.globalAssetId, asset.assetKind

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'CRX10iA_001'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN sm.idShort, sm.id, sc.id AS templateSemanticId

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'Nameplate'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(prop:Property)
RETURN aas.idShort AS device_idShort, prop.idShort, prop.value AS propValue

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'CRX10iA_001'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN sm.idShort, sm.id, sc.id AS templateSemanticId

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'MiR100_001'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN sm.idShort, sm.id, sc.id AS templateSemanticId

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'MiR100_001'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'TechnicalData'})
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN sm.idShort, sc.id AS templateSemanticId

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'UR3e_002'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN sm.idShort, sm.id, sc.id AS templateSemanticId

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'TechnicalData'})
RETURN aas.idShort, aas.id, sm.idShort

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'MiR100_Type'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN sm.idShort, sc.id AS templateSemanticId

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'Nameplate'})
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['CRX10iA_001', 'MiR100_001', 'UR3e_002']
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(prop:Property)
RETURN aas.idShort AS device, prop.idShort, prop.value AS value

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/SubmodelTemplate/technicaldataagv/1/0'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(prop:Property)
RETURN aas.idShort, sm.idShort, prop.idShort, prop.value AS propValue

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'TechnicalData'})

MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(prop:Property)

args.name: FacilityInformation

args.cypher:
MATCH (sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/dfki/SubmodelTemplate/FacilityInformation/1/0'})
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property {idShort: 'Area'})-[:HAS_VALUE]->(area:LangString)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(mlp:MultiLanguageProperty {idShort: 'PrimaryUse'})-[:HAS_VALUE]->(use:LangString)
RETURN aas.idShort AS aasIdShort, aas.id AS aasId, sm.idShort AS smIdShort, area.text AS area, use.text AS primaryUse

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: 'urn:aas:hall4'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN sm.idShort, sm.id, sc.id AS templateSemanticId

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall4:hierarchicalstructures'})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
RETURN el.idShort, labels(el) AS types, el.entityType, el.value, el.valueType

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall4:hierarchicalstructures'})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(e:Entity)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
RETURN e.idShort AS device, a.globalAssetId AS assetId, a.assetKind

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
WHERE asset.globalAssetId IN ['urn:asset:crx10ia:001', 'urn:asset:mir100:001', 'urn:asset:ur3e:002']
RETURN aas.idShort AS deviceLabel, aas.id AS aasId, asset.globalAssetId AS assetId

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/nameplate/3/0/Nameplate'})
WHERE aas.id IN ['urn:aas:crx10ia:001', 'urn:aas:mir100:001', 'urn:aas:ur3e:002']
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort IN ['ManufacturerName', 'SerialNumber', 'ManufacturerPartNumber', 'SoftwareVersion', 'SupersededBy']
WITH aas, sm, p
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(mlp:MultiLanguageProperty)
WHERE mlp.idShort IN ['Description', 'DisplayName']
RETURN aas.idShort AS device, sm.idShort AS sm, p.idShort AS prop, p.value AS val

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/nameplate/3/0/Nameplate'})
WHERE aas.id IN ['urn:aas:crx10ia:001', 'urn:aas:mir100:001', 'urn:aas:ur3e:002']
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(mlp:MultiLanguageProperty {idShort: 'Description'})-[:HAS_VALUE]->(desc:LangString)
RETURN aas.idShort AS device, desc.language AS lang, desc.text AS description

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/nameplate/3/0/Nameplate'})
WHERE aas.id IN ['urn:aas:crx10ia:001', 'urn:aas:mir100:001', 'urn:aas:ur3e:002']
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort IN ['ManufacturerName', 'ManufacturerPartNumber', 'SoftwareVersion', 'ProductCode', 'RatingPower', 'RatedPower']
RETURN aas.idShort AS device, p.idShort AS prop, p.value AS val, p.valueType AS vt

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: 'urn:aas:crx10ia:001'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
RETURN sm.idShort, sm.id

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
MATCH (aas)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
MATCH (aas)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm2:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/nameplate/3/0/Nameplate'})
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm2)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)-[:HAS_VALUE]->(v:LangString)
WHERE p.idShort IN ['ManufacturerName', 'ManufacturerPartNumber', 'ProductCode', 'SoftwareVersion', 'RatedPower', 'RatingPower', 'SerialNumber']
RETURN aas.idShort AS device, aas.id AS aasId, asset.globalAssetId, p.idShort AS prop, v.text AS val

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: 'urn:aas:crx10ia:001'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/nameplate/3/0/Nameplate'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
RETURN el.idShort, el.value, el.valueType

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept {id: '0173-1#01-AHX837#002'})
WHERE aas.id IN ['urn:aas:crx10ia:001', 'urn:aas:mir100:001', 'urn:aas:ur3e:002']
RETURN aas.idShort AS device, sm.idShort AS smIdShort

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: 'urn:aas:crx10ia:001'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN sm.idShort, sm.id, sc.id

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: 'urn:aas:crx10ia:001'})-[:DERIVED_FROM]->(type:AssetAdministrationShell)
MATCH (type)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN sm.idShort, sm.id, sc.id

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: 'urn:aas:crx10ia:001'})-[:DERIVED_FROM]->(type:AssetAdministrationShell)
MATCH (type)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {idShort: 'TechnicalData'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
RETURN p.idShort, p.value, p.valueType

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: 'urn:aas:mir100:001'})-[:DERIVED_FROM]->(type:AssetAdministrationShell)
MATCH (type)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort IN ['ManufacturerOrderCode', 'ManufacturerArticleNumber', 'ManufacturerName', 'ProductClassId', 'ClassificationSystem']
RETURN aas.idShort AS device, p.idShort AS prop, p.value AS val

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: 'urn:aas:ur3e:002'})-[:DERIVED_FROM]->(type:AssetAdministrationShell)
MATCH (type)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort IN ['ManufacturerOrderCode', 'ManufacturerArticleNumber', 'ManufacturerName', 'ProductClassId', 'ClassificationSystem']
RETURN aas.idShort AS device, p.idShort AS prop, p.value AS val

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: 'urn:aas:ur3e:002'})-[:DERIVED_FROM]->(type:AssetAdministrationShell)
MATCH (type)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
RETURN p.idShort, p.value, p.valueType

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: 'urn:aas:mir100:001'})-[:DERIVED_FROM]->(type:AssetAdministrationShell)
MATCH (type)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)

      -[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(entity:Entity)

args.cypher:
MATCH (sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)

MATCH (container:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
      -[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/HierarchicalStructures/1/1'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(parent:Entity)-[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(child:Entity)
MATCH (child)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
RETURN container.idShort AS hall, parent.idShort AS parent_entity, child.idShort AS child_entity, asset.globalAssetId AS asset_id

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall4:hierarchicalstructures'})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*0..1]->(el:SubmodelElement)
RETURN labels(el) AS types, el.idShort AS id_short
ORDER BY el.idShort

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall4:hierarchicalstructures'})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*1..]->(e:Entity)
WHERE e.idShort = 'EntryNode'
MATCH (e)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*0..]->(child:Entity)
RETURN e.idShort AS entity_id, child.idShort AS child_id

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall4:hierarchicalstructures'})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(entity:Entity)
MATCH (entity)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
RETURN entity.idShort AS entity_name, asset.globalAssetId AS asset_id, asset.assetKind

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall4:hierarchicalstructures'})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(parent:Entity)-[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(child:Entity)
WHERE NOT (parent)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(:Asset)
MATCH (child)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
RETURN parent.idShort AS parent_entity, child.idShort AS child_entity, asset.globalAssetId AS asset_id

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
WHERE asset.globalAssetId IN ['urn:asset:crx10ia:001', 'urn:asset:mir100:001', 'urn:asset:ur3e:002']
RETURN aas.idShort AS aas_name, aas.id AS aas_id, asset.globalAssetId, asset.assetKind

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_DISPLAY_NAME]->(name:LangString)
WHERE toLower(name.text) CONTAINS 'hall 4'
RETURN aas.id AS aas_id, aas.idShort, name.text AS display_name

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)
RETURN aas.id AS aas_id, aas.idShort
LIMIT 50

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: "Hall4"})-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
RETURN asset.globalAssetId AS globalAssetId, asset.assetKind AS assetKind, asset.assetType AS assetType
